content:
IVX FINAL CREDENTIAL SYNC + TOOL VAULT

MISSION:
Complete IVX tools so any third-party credential can be synced, tested, stored securely, and used by IVX IA without Rork.

TOOLS TO SYNC:
1 GitHub
2 Render
3 Supabase
4 Vercel
5 AWS
6 Google Play
7 Apple Store
8 Cloudflare
9 Stripe
10 Email/SMS providers

RULES:
- Never print secrets
- Never expose tokens
- Test every credential before use
- If missing, return exact variable name
- If invalid, return exact HTTP error
- Store only in IVX secure vault / Render env
- Do not use expired tokens
- Do not use sandbox-only tokens

CREATE COMMANDS:
/vault-status
/vault-sync
/vault-test
/github-sync
/render-sync
/supabase-sync
/aws-sync
/vercel-sync
/google-play-sync
/apple-store-sync
/platform-status

FOR EACH CREDENTIAL RETURN:
NAME:
EXISTS: YES/NO
AUTH_TEST: PASS/FAIL
HTTP_STATUS:
PERMISSION:
ERROR:

FINAL VERIFY:
GITHUB_WRITE:
RENDER_DEPLOY:
SUPABASE_WRITE:
VERCEL_DEPLOY:
AWS_ACCESS:
GOOGLE_PLAY_ACCESS:
APPLE_STORE_ACCESS:
VAULT_STATUS:
TOOLS_STATUS:
FINAL_STATUS:

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if credentials are synced, tested, and IVX IA can execute deploy/QA/evidence without Rork.

No narrative.
No placeholders.
No fake verified.
Live evidence only.
